entries.title: Reusable sections index.
entries.notes: Capture after installing content-sections with content-blocks and layout-builder, with at least three seeded sections across different blueprints so table filters, columns, and navigation state are visible.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews reusable sections before choosing which shared content block to update.

entries.title: Create reusable section form.
entries.notes: Capture with the blueprint selector visible. The form depends on Layout Builder blueprints registered by the installed package.
entries.useCase: An editor starts a new reusable section and chooses the section blueprint that controls the available fields.

entries.title: Edit reusable section with assets.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded section with translations and at least one related block asset so the relation manager tab is not empty.
entries.useCase: An editor updates shared section copy and checks which block assets are attached before saving.

entries.title: Section selector modal.
entries.notes: Requires a host admin workflow that opens ModalTableSelect, such as attaching section assets from a block or layout field.
entries.useCase: An editor searches existing reusable sections from the modal before attaching one to another content surface.

entries.title: Frontend section block gallery.
entries.notes: Seed one public page that renders each registered section block family. Anonymous output must not expose authoring markers, editor URLs, internal IDs, or package internals.
entries.useCase: A maintainer verifies the public section gallery renders every package-owned block safely for anonymous visitors.
